text:
Market today: The mood is cautious, driven by escalating geopolitical tensions (oil, Russia/Ukraine) and new US-China cyber concerns. These are the real drivers, potentially impacting your highly concentrated tech/chip book.

Your holdings: SOXL (-33.5%) is a major concern, being leveraged and decaying; its default stop needs review. SPAL (-13.56%), also leveraged and new, requires close monitoring. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on any further news regarding US-China tech tensions, as this directly affects your chip exposure. Also, monitor QQQI's price action near its stop at 52.

Bottom line: Prioritize risk management on your leveraged positions and respect your stops in this volatile environment.
plays: SOXL: Given the -33.5% loss and leveraged nature, seriously consider trimming further or tightening your stop to protect capital.
QQQI: With a TRIM status and PnL at -1.68%, respect your stop at 52 to avoid further losses on this income anchor.
PANW: For a potential new position, the scanner flags PANW as a BUY (9/12, A bias) with entry 354.48-353.94 and stop 350.63.
